ogTitle: Wantirna vs Waranga Shores: Climate Safety

heading: Wantirna vs Waranga Shores — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wantirna, Victoria and Waranga Shores, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Waranga Shores has a lower overall climate risk score (45/100) compared to Wantirna (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wantirna or Waranga Shores safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wantirna has a flood risk score of 59/100, while Waranga Shores scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wantirna scores 57/100 for bushfire risk. Waranga Shores scores 63/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wantirna or Waranga Shores?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Waranga Shores has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.35% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
